content: Hey, I'm thinking of attending the Portland Marathon this weekend. Do you think I can squeeze in a training run before that?
That sounds like a great goal! What's your current training schedule like?
I've been trying to get in at least 3 runs a week, but it's been tough with work and taking care of my parents. I work as a Blockchain Developer at a DeFi protocol in downtown Portland.
It can be challenging to balance work and family responsibilities. Have you considered joining a local running group to help stay motivated?
That's a great idea! I've actually been looking into the Portland Running Club. I've also been trying to get into home automation in my free time, but it's been slow going.
Home automation can be a fun hobby. What kind of projects have you been working on?
Just some basic smart lighting and thermostat controls. I've also been trying to get back into leatherworking, which I used to do in my free time before my parents needed more care.
It's great that you're trying to find time for your hobbies again. Do you have a dedicated space for your leatherworking projects?
Yeah, I have a small workshop in my garage. I'm hoping to get back into it more regularly once my parents' health stabilizes. Maybe I can even make some custom cases for my DJing equipment.
That sounds like a great way to combine your hobbies. Are you planning on performing at any upcoming events?
Actually, I'm thinking of spinning some tracks at my friend's birthday party next month on the 15th. It'll be a great way to get back into the scene.
That sounds like a blast! I hope you have a great time and get to enjoy some music and good company.
